Iran’s exiled crown prince urges protesters not to ‘abandon the streets’]]></title><description><![CDATA[Widespread anti-government protests in Iran have entered their second week, escalating from economic grievances to calls for political change. Exiled crown prince Reza Pahlavi has re-emerged, urging protesters to remain on the streets and advocating for a secular, democratic transition.]]></description><link><![CDATA[https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/middle-east/who-is-reza-pahlavi-irans-exiled-crown-prince-urges-protesters-not-to-abandon-the-streets/articleshow/126461905.cms]]></link><guid><![CDATA[https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/middle-east/who-is-reza-pahlavi-irans-exiled-crown-prince-urges-protesters-not-to-abandon-the-streets/articleshow/126461905.cms]]></guid><pubDate>Sun, 11 Jan 2026 11:27:11 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI WORLD DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="673773" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-126461937,imgsize-673773.cms"/></item><item><title><![CDATA[Taylor Swift reportedly uneasy about combining finances with Travis Kelce]]></title><description><![CDATA[Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce have been together for more than two years now and have inspired billions of fans with the love and commitment they have shown towards each other. As the two plan their lavish wedding, it seems Taylor Swift is very focused on signing a strong prenup that is all set to protect all her assets and wealth.]]></description><link><![CDATA[https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/nfl/news/shes-been-upfront-about-it-billionaire-taylor-swift-reportedly-uneasy-about-combining-finances-with-travis-kelce-ahead-of-their-high-profile-wedding/articleshow/126458157.cms]]></link><guid><![CDATA[https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/nfl/news/shes-been-upfront-about-it-billionaire-taylor-swift-reportedly-uneasy-about-combining-finances-with-travis-kelce-ahead-of-their-high-profile-wedding/articleshow/126458157.cms]]></guid><pubDate>Sun, 11 Jan 2026 03:50:00 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>MAHIMA ROY</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="821068" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-126458163,imgsize-821068.cms"/></item></channel></rss>
